name: Seafood Pizza Primavera
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8 oz each) Refrigerated crescent rolls
1 can (6 oz) BORDEN or MEADOW GOLD Sour cream
1/2 cup (4 oz) BENNET's Chili, Cocktail, or other desired chili
1 can (4 1/3 oz) ORLEANS Shrimp, drained and soaked as label directs
1 can (6 oz) Harris or Orleans Crab Meat, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Unroll the crescent roll dough and press it onto a 15x10-inch baking sheet, pressing the perforations together.
3. Bake for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
4. Remove from oven and allow to cool.
5. Combine sour cream and chili in a bowl.
6. Spread the mixture evenly over the crust.
7. Arrange the cooked shrimp, crab meat, broccoli, green onions, green bell pepper, and red bell pepper on top of the sauce.
8. Chill for at least 30 minutes before cutting into squares to serve.
9. Refrigerate any leftovers.
